
Data Summary
=====================================

Row
-------------------------------------

### Data Availability

```{r data_avail_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$data_availability)}
da <- mv$data_availability
da$present_num <- as.integer(da$present)

# Encode as fleet x datatype grid across years
fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = fleets)

p <- plot_ly()
dtypes <- rev(unique(da$datatype))
for (i in seq_along(dtypes)) {
  dt <- dtypes[i]
  for (j in seq_along(fleets)) {
    fl <- fleets[j]
    sub <- da[da$datatype == dt & da$fleet == fl &
              da$present, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0) next
    # Stagger vertically within datatype
    y_val <- i + (j - 1) * 0.15
    p <- add_markers(
      p = p,
      x = sub$year,
      y = rep(y_val, nrow(sub)),
      marker = list(
        color = fc[fl], size = 5,
        symbol = "circle"
      ),
      name = fl,
      legendgroup = fl,
      showlegend = (i == 1),
      hovertemplate = paste0(
        fl, " ", dt, " %{x}<extra></extra>"
      )
    )
  }
}

lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$yaxis$tickvals <- seq_along(dtypes)
lay$yaxis$ticktext <- dtypes
lay$yaxis$title <- ""
lay$xaxis$title <- "Year"
lay$title <- "Data Availability"
lay$showlegend <- TRUE
lay$margin$l <- 100

p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Model Information

```{r model_info}
info_df <- data.frame(
  Property = c(
    "Model type", "Label",
    "Years", "Ages",
    "Sexes", "Fleets",
    "Commercial", "Survey",
    "Areas",
    "Length comps", "Discards", "MCMC"
  ),
  Value = c(
    meta$model_type,
    meta$label,
    paste(min(years), "-", max(years)),
    paste(min(ages), "-", max(ages)),
    paste(sexes, collapse = ", "),
    paste(fleets, collapse = ", "),
    paste(comm_fleets, collapse = ", "),
    paste(survey_fleets, collapse = ", "),
    paste(areas, collapse = ", "),
    ifelse(test = has_len, yes = "Yes", no = "No"),
    ifelse(test = has_disc, yes = "Yes", no = "No"),
    ifelse(test = has_mcmc, yes = "Yes", no = "No")
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(
  x = info_df, caption = "Model summary",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
